session.user:
Run these test commands in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report ALL results. Do NOT fix anything.
1. `uv run pytest tests/commands/objective/test_plan_one_shot.py -v --tb=short` (one-shot tests) 2. `uv run pytest tests/commands/objective/ tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -60` (all objective tests - just show summary)
Report all output.
session.assistant: I'll run these test commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/commands/objective/ tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -60
